title: Can I organize the items on a board by date without sorting each time I open a board?
excerpt: I want to be able to see all my items in order of their date/deadline in the specific column without having to to put a sorting filter every time I open/reload a board. It would save time organizing my tasks and help aut…

posts.author: ELE (ELE)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to see all my items in order of their date/deadline in the specific column without having to to put a sorting filter every time I open/reload a board. It would save time organizing my tasks and help automate keeping them in sequential order for the whole team!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ELE
Welcome to the community

You can save a sorted or filtered board as a new view.
This way, any time you open that view, it will have your items sorted or filtered.

image1328×565 35 KB
